meta.title: US Dept of Defense Panel
meta.description: Daryl Haegley leads a panel of US Department of Defense executives in a discussion on OT Cybersecurity on bases and other facilities and systems that DoD owns and relies on. In the second half they focus on how the commercial OT security community can help DoD achieve its mission. And finally they tackle the question of how much coordination is occurring between .gov organizations.
